mapper.select: SELECT ccs.*, co.name as coach_name FROM coach_course_schedule ccs LEFT JOIN coach co ON ccs.coach_id = co.id ORDER BY ccs.schedule_date ASC, ccs.start_time ASC
SELECT ccs.*, co.name as coach_name FROM coach_course_schedule ccs LEFT JOIN coach co ON ccs.coach_id = co.id WHERE ccs.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY ccs.schedule_date ASC, ccs.start_time ASC
SELECT ccs.*, co.name as coach_name FROM coach_course_schedule ccs LEFT JOIN coach co ON ccs.coach_id = co.id WHERE ccs.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_course_schedule (coach_id, course_id, course_name, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, location, max_students, current_students, status) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{scheduleDate}, #{startTime, typeHandler=com.gym.handler.StringTimeTypeHandler}, #{endTime, typeHandler=com.gym.handler.StringTimeTypeHandler}, #{location}, #{maxStudents}, #{currentStudents}, #{status})
